title: Hololive Stuff
body:
# New: Ina Wahpdate (pwaht wahne)
- Minecraft version 1.21.11 from this update onwards
- (+ explorer maps for Bunkeronii and Sana's Tower so you can find them in Survival mode)
![Ina Wahpdate](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dc27ef27e148c17e718341b6caa14447ff9db9d7_0.webp)
# Features:
## Structures
- From HoloEN server replica: https://www.planetminecraft.com/project/hololive-en-replica/
- Bunkeronii (Kronii)
- Sana's Tower and its vicinity (Sana)
- Toriina Gate (Ina)

## Items
- Music discs (Ina originals)
- Random stuff

## Mobs
- Ina
- Takodachi

# Ignore This Part
### Bunkeronii todos:
- More landscaping (if I'm ever bothered to)
- Mumei's fox room
- Secret entrance in storage room

### Bunkeronii issues idk how to solve atm:
- Endermen in boats don't work
- Snow foxes sometimes become unsnowy foxes
- Leashed foxes become unleashed
- One of the paintings in Fauna and Mumei's secret room sometimes falls off
